judge_score.notes: Port captures most API surface (sqlite3_open/close/exec/prepare_v2/step/finalize/column_*) and core SQL features (CREATE TABLE, INSERT, SELECT with WHERE/ORDER BY/JOIN). However, significant gaps exist: RowCtx.ColIndex returns int but C version returns via out-params (semantic mismatch); ORDER BY sort only handles single-table case and lacks multi-table column offset mapping; expression evaluation context handling differs substantially; no transaction state enforcement despite in_txn flag; StepSelect rebuilds RowCtx incorrectly for joins (creates single-row array instead of proper per-table split). Architecture divergence in value copying semantics and memory model.
